# CircleCI CLI

Control whether an orb is visible in the CircleCI orb registry.

Pass 'true' to hide the orb (unlist it from search results).
Pass 'false' to restore the orb's visibility.

Unlisted orbs can still be used if you know the exact orb reference.

## Usage

`circleci orb unlist <ns>/<orb> true|false`

## Inherited Flags

| Flag                  | Description                                                  |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `-c, --config string` | path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml) |
| `--debug`             | enable debug logging                                         |
| `-q, --quiet`         | suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected  |

## Examples

- Hide an orb from the registry: 
  `circleci orb unlist myorg/my-orb true`
- Restore an orb's visibility: 
  `circleci orb unlist myorg/my-orb false`

## Learn More

- Use `circleci <command> <subcommand> --help` for more information about a command.
- Read the manual at <https://circleci.com/docs/local-cli>
- Support at <https://github.com/CircleCI-Public/circleci-cli/issues>
